engineeringTeam.projectName: Factory delivery — Milestone C agent autonomy verify [factory-milestone-c-mqsmdppp]
engineeringTeam.requirements: Prove GP-003/004/014/017/019/020-021/023 agent-driven factory delivery on coordinated stack.

autoApprovalPolicy.rationale: Low-risk Simple Execution Contract meets all policy criteria: complete acceptance criteria, no risk flags, no unresolved dependencies, no production auth/security/data-model paths, and a clear rollback path.

criteria.rollbackPath: Rollback by reverting the pilot PR and removing the README golden-path marker.

metricsPolicy.reason: Autonomous delivery is trusted only when low-risk policy approval later closes successfully.

phase1.forgeReadinessNote: Forge execution readiness remains GP-009; intake-draft DRAFT stage blocks readiness until workflow advances post-approval.

acceptanceCriteria: Forge lifecycle reaches completed after gate approvals
